title: Alien Power Sources
summary: Craft run by thought — why advanced civilizations abandon electricity, per the Arcturian physicist Nara.
markdown:
**Alien power sources** get their fullest treatment in the April 14, 2024 session, where an
Arcturian physicist called [Nara](/lore/arcturians/) explains the engineering of her people's
craft — and the answer is startlingly simple: **there is no engine.** *"Basically a structure.
No machine, no engine… vibrationally sensitive, reactive to the way you think… run by
thought. Thought is the power source of our technological marvel."* The vessel is designed
molecularly to align to consciousness itself.

Why not electricity? Nara's physics is precise: electromagnetic systems *"cannot traverse
certain interdimensional wormholes or time traveling — it would interfere"* — and their
pollution "affects your genetic code, hindering your progression to higher vibration." Every
cosmic civilization, she says, passes through an electromagnetic age and then **leaves it,
"entering consciousness itself."** The design language given is geometric — build "according to
this geometric angle… you call Fibonacci," using the universe itself as resonant source — and
the operating principle is the archive's whole metaphysics in one line: *"Once you believe,
therefore, it is real."*

Earthly power gets its interim roadmap elsewhere — the "graphene-rod ionic receiver" systems
and fusion generators of the [DARPA-era](/lore/darpa/) sessions — but the Arcturian teaching
marks the destination: past [anti-gravity](/lore/anti-gravity/), past the grid, to machines
that move because a mind asks them to.
